description: The Fabbrocino clan is a Camorra mafia-type criminal organization originating from the area between Ottaviano, San Gennaro Vesuviano, and San Giuseppe Vesuviano in Italy. It was founded by Mario Fabbrocino after breaking away from Michele Zaza's group. The clan controls a vast territory in the Vesuvian area and is involved in diverse criminal activities including extortion, vote-buying, and money laundering through legitimate businesses. Mario Fabbrocino was sentenced to life imprisonment for the murder of Roberto Cutolo.

country_links.evidence_quote: Mario Fabbrocino fu arrestato a San Martin, trenta chilometri circa da Buenos Aires , in Argentina , i primi di settembre 1997 .
country_links.context: The clan's boss Mario Fabbrocino was arrested in Argentina after being a fugitive.

country_links.evidence_quote: Berardo Striano, braccio destro di Mario Fabbrocino 'o gravunaro, ... fu arrestato all'aeroporto di Colonia , in Germania , il 25 febbraio 1997 , mentre stava per prendere il volo per l' Argentina .
country_links.context: The clan's associate Berardo Striano was arrested at Cologne airport while attempting to flee to Argentina.
